
---
title: "Bank_pr5"
author: "Raahat"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---
```{r}
# Set working directory (change path as needed)
setwd("D:/raahat_230957216")

# Import data from a text file

loan_data <- scan("bank_case.txt")

# View first few observations
head(loan_data)


loan_ts <- ts(loan_data,
              start = c(2000, 1),
              frequency = 12)

# Check structure
loan_ts


plot(loan_ts,
     main = "Monthly Commercial Bank Real Estate Loans",
     xlab = "Time",
     ylab = "Loans (Billions of Dollars)",
     col = "blue")


# ACF plot
acf(loan_ts,
    main = "ACF of Real Estate Loan Series")

# PACF plot
pacf(loan_ts,
     main = "PACF of Real Estate Loan Series")


# Load package
library(tseries)

# Perform ADF test
adf.test(loan_ts)


loan_diff <- diff(loan_ts)

plot(loan_diff,
     main = "Differenced Loan Series")

acf(loan_diff)
pacf(loan_diff)
adf.test(loan_diff)
```
